messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
顧客於換領積分時反映換領禮品程序繁複費時，以電郵回覆顧客

親愛的客戶，

感謝您回覆我們的積分兌換通知。我們很抱歉听到您对換領禮品程序的繁複和費時的反饋。我們深感遺憾，因為客戶滿意度是我們非常注重的事情，我們一直致力於提供快速和便捷的服務。

我們正在研究您提出的問題，並將進行相應的改進措施，以減少程序的複雜性和節省換領禮品所需的時間。我們確實希望能夠為您提供更好的服務體驗。

如果您有任何其他問題或意見，請隨時告知。我們非常重視您的反饋，並將盡力解決任何問題。

再次感謝您對我們的支持和耐心等待。

祝您有美好的一天！

誠摯地，

[您的名字]
[您的職位]
[您的公司名稱]
3.	Full height glazing / decoration along shopfront shall be erected in order to fully enclose the shop to avoid emission of odour  翻譯中文
需要在商店前方建立完整的玻璃幕墻/裝飾，以完全封閉商店，避免散發異味。
根據早前於2023年9月22日fitting out comments72頁第3點提及到的文章     翻譯英文

According to the article mentioned in the fitting out comments dated September 22, 2023, on page 72, it states:

"Full height glazing / decoration along shopfront shall be erected in order to fully enclose the shop to avoid emission of odour."

根據早前於2023年9月22日的裝修意見中提及的文章，在第72頁中提到：

"需要在商店前方建立完整的玻璃幕墻/裝飾，以完全封閉商店，避免散發異味。"

We are the building manager of The ONE.

We are writing to put on record that a bodily injury incident happened at around 15:31 on 15 September 2023. A female shopper, Ms. Choi, slipped down on the common corridor outside Lift No.8. at L3 floor. Her left knee was injured and she approached our staff to report such incident instantly.

After we arrived the scene, we found that the concerned floor was wet and slippery. According to our CCTV record, we revealed that an ice granules delivery worker had placed the ice granules at the outside lift no. 7 and delivered ice granules to your premises at around 15:22. Therefore, we reasonably suspected that the wet floor was caused by water droplets came out from the pack of ice granules which was delivered to your shop. 

As all tenants should take the responsibility to ensure all workers pay the highest attention on the safety of their work which to avoid happening of any accident in shopping mall, we hereby request your company to review the delivery arrangement by using proper delivery cart and monitor the performance of your delivery workers closely without any delay.

In this case, the lady concerned has expressed that she would make claim regarding this incident. We, therefore, would hold your company liable for all proceedings, damages, cost, expenses, and claims whatsoever arising directly or indirectly from the incident. To the best of your interest, you are also strongly advised to report the aforesaid incident to both your ice granules delivery/supply company and your insurance company.

Dear [Shop Owner or Company],

We, as the building manager of The ONE, are writing to inform you of a bodily injury incident that occurred at approximately 15:31 on 15th September 2023. A female shopper, Ms. Choi, slipped and fell on the common corridor outside Lift No.8 on the 3rd floor. As a result, she injured her left knee and immediately reported the incident to our staff.

Upon arriving at the scene, we observed that the floor in question was wet and slippery. After reviewing the CCTV footage, we discovered that an ice granules delivery worker had placed the ice granules outside Lift No.7 and subsequently delivered them to your premises at around 15:22. This leads us to reasonably suspect that the wet floor was caused by water droplets from the pack of ice granules delivered to your shop.

Given that all tenants are responsible for ensuring that workers prioritize safety to avoid any accidents within the shopping mall, we kindly request that your company review the delivery arrangements by utilizing appropriate delivery carts and monitor the performance of your delivery workers closely without delay.

In light of this incident, the injured party has expressed her intention to file a claim. Therefore, we hold your company liable for any legal proceedings, damages, costs, expenses, and claims arising directly or indirectly from the incident. In your best interest, we strongly advise you to report the aforementioned incident to both your ice granules delivery/supply company and your insurance company.

Should you require any further information or discuss this matter, please do not hesitate to contact us. We appreciate your immediate attention to this issue and cooperation in ensuring the safety of all visitors to The ONE.

Yours sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Building Manager of The ONE]

We are the building manager of The ONE.

We are writing to put on record that a bodily injury incident happened at around 15:31 on 15 September 2023. A female shopper, Ms. Choi, slipped down on the common corridor outside Lift No.8. at L3 floor. Her left knee was injured and she approached our staff to report such incident instantly.

After we arrived the scene, we found that the concerned floor was wet and slippery. According to our CCTV record, we revealed that an ice granules delivery worker had placed the ice granules at the outside lift no. 7 and delivered ice granules to your premises at around 15:22. Therefore, we reasonably suspected that the wet floor was caused by water droplets came out from the pack of ice granules which was delivered to your shop. 

As all tenants should take the responsibility to ensure all workers pay the highest attention on the safety of their work which to avoid happening of any accident in shopping mall, we hereby request your company to review the delivery arrangement by using proper delivery cart and monitor the performance of your delivery workers closely without any delay.

In this case, the lady concerned has expressed that she would make claim regarding this incident. We, therefore, would hold your company liable for all proceedings, damages, cost, expenses, and claims whatsoever arising directly or indirectly from the incident. To the best of your interest, you are also strongly advised to report the aforesaid incident to both your ice granules delivery/supply company and your insurance company.
就以上信件，

建築物經理

我們以The ONE的建築物經理身份，寫信是要記錄一起發生在2023年9月15日下午15:31左右的人身傷害事件。一位女顧客，崔女士，在L3樓外8號電梯的公共走廊上滑倒。她的左膝受傷，並立即向我們的工作人員報告了這一事件。

在我們到場後，我們發現該地板潮濕而滑溜。根據我們的閉路電視記錄，我們發現一名冰粒運送工人在15:22左右將冰粒放在7號電梯外並將冰粒運送到貴公司的場所。因此，我們合理地懷疑潮濕的地板是由冰粒包裝中的水滴引起的，該包裝被運送到貴公司的店面。

由於所有租戶都應該對確保工人對工作的安全性給予最高度的關注以避免商場發生任何事故負責，我們在此要求貴公司檢討運送安排，使用合適的運送車輛，並密切監控運送工人的表現，不要延誤。

在這個案例中，涉事女士表示她將對這一事件提出索賠。因此，我們將追究貴公司在該事件中因何而產生的所有法律程序、損害、費用、開支和索賠責任，無論直接或間接。為了保護您的最大利益，我們強烈建議您向冰粒運送/供應公司和保險公司報告上述事件。

如果您需要進一步的信息或討論此事，請隨時與我們聯繫。我們非常重視您對這個問題的即時關注和合作，以確保所有來訪The ONE的訪客的安全。

謹此，

[您的姓名]
[您的職位]
[The ONE建築物經理]

We are the building manager of The ONE.

We are writing to put on record that a bodily injury incident happened at around 15:31 on 15 September 2023. A female shopper, Ms. Choi, slipped down on the common corridor outside Lift No.8. at L3 floor. Her left knee was injured and she approached our staff to report such incident instantly.

After we arrived the scene, we found that the concerned floor was wet and slippery. According to our CCTV record, we revealed that an ice granules delivery worker had placed the ice granules at the outside lift no. 7 and delivered ice granules to your premises at around 15:22. Therefore, we reasonably suspected that the wet floor was caused by water droplets came out from the pack of ice granules which was delivered to your shop. 

As all tenants should take the responsibility to ensure all workers pay the highest attention on the safety of their work which to avoid happening of any accident in shopping mall, we hereby request your company to review the delivery arrangement by using proper delivery cart and monitor the performance of your delivery workers closely without any delay.

In this case, the lady concerned has expressed that she would make claim regarding this incident. We, therefore, would hold your company liable for all proceedings, damages, cost, expenses, and claims whatsoever arising directly or indirectly from the incident. To the best of your interest, you are also strongly advised to report the aforesaid incident to both your ice granules delivery/supply company and your insurance company.

Building Manager,

We acknowledge and appreciate your communication regarding the bodily injury incident that occurred at around 15:31 on 15th September 2023 at The ONE. We take this matter seriously and will ensure it is properly documented.

We have been informed that Ms. Choi, a female shopper, slipped in the common corridor outside Lift No.8 on the 3rd floor, resulting in an injury to her left knee. We commend her for promptly reporting the incident to your staff.

Upon arriving at the scene, we discovered that the floor in question was wet and slippery. After examining the CCTV footage, we determined that an ice granules delivery worker had placed the ice granules outside Lift No.7 and subsequently delivered them to your premises at approximately 15:22. This leads us to reasonably suspect that the wet floor was due to water droplets from the pack of ice granules delivered to your shop.

As responsible tenants, it is crucial to prioritize the safety of all workers to prevent accidents within the shopping mall. Therefore, we kindly request that your company review the delivery arrangement, ensuring the use of proper delivery carts, and closely monitor the performance of your delivery workers without delay.

In light of this incident, Ms. Choi has expressed her intention to file a claim. Consequently, we hold your company accountable for all associated legal proceedings, damages, costs, expenses, and claims, whether directly or indirectly arising from the incident. To safeguard your interests, we strongly advise you to report this incident to both your ice granules delivery/supply company and your insurance provider.

Should you have any further questions or require additional information, please do not hesitate to contact us. We value your immediate attention to this matter and appreciate your cooperation in maintaining the safety of all visitors to The ONE.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Building Manager of The ONE]
就以上信件，送冰公司同樣沒有任何保護措施之下送冰，以英文出一封信，警告並禁止送冰公司沒有任何保謢措施進入本商場範圍內

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Building Manager of The ONE]
[Your Company's Name]
[Your Company's Address]
[City, Postal Code]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Position]
[Recipient's Company's Name]
[Recipient's Company's Address]
[City, Postal Code]

Subject: Notice and Prohibition of Ice Delivery Services Without Proper Safety Measures

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to you as the building manager of The ONE to bring to your attention a matter of high importance related to the delivery of ice to our premises. We have recently experienced an incident involving an injury caused by wet and slippery floors resulting from the delivery of ice without appropriate safety measures.

On [Date], at approximately [Time], a bodily injury incident occurred at The ONE. A shopper slipped and fell on the common corridor outside Lift No.8 on the 3rd floor, sustaining an injury as a result. Our investigation, which included reviewing CCTV footage, revealed that an ice granules delivery worker from your company had delivered ice granules to our premises at around [Time]. Their actions, however, were performed without any protective measures, leading to water droplets causing hazardous conditions and the subsequent accident.

Given this incident, we hereby issue a formal warning and prohibit your company from entering the premises of The ONE for ice delivery services until further notice. It is imperative that your delivery operations adhere to the highest standards of safety to ensure the well-being of our tenants and visitors.

We strongly urge you to take immediate action to implement comprehensive safety measures for ice delivery. These should include, but are not limited to, providing appropriate delivery carts that prevent leakage or spillage, ensuring proper packaging of ice granules, and training your delivery workers to handle such materials safely.

Ensuring the safety of everyone within our premises is of paramount importance. Therefore, compliance with these requirements is non-negotiable. Failure to comply may result in the termination of your services at The ONE indefinitely.

We request that you acknowledge receipt of this letter and provide us with a detailed plan outlining the steps you will take to enhance safety in your ice delivery operations by [Date].

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter. We trust that you will undertake all necessary measures to prevent similar incidents in the future. Should you have any questions or require further clarification, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

Yours sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Building Manager of The ONE]

We are the building manager of The ONE.

We are writing to put on record that a bodily injury incident happened at around 15:31 on 15 September 2023. A female shopper, Ms. Choi, slipped down on the common corridor outside Lift No.8. at L3 floor. Her left knee was injured and she approached our staff to report such incident instantly.

After we arrived the scene, we found that the concerned floor was wet and slippery. According to our CCTV record, we revealed that an ice granules delivery worker had placed the ice granules at the outside lift no. 7 and delivered ice granules to your premises at around 15:22. Therefore, we reasonably suspected that the wet floor was caused by water droplets came out from the pack of ice granules which was delivered to your shop. 

As all tenants should take the responsibility to ensure all workers pay the highest attention on the safety of their work which to avoid happening of any accident in shopping mall, we hereby request your company to review the delivery arrangement by using proper delivery cart and monitor the performance of your delivery workers closely without any delay.

In this case, the lady concerned has expressed that she would make claim regarding this incident. We, therefore, would hold your company liable for all proceedings, damages, cost, expenses, and claims whatsoever arising directly or indirectly from the incident. To the best of your interest, you are also strongly advised to report the aforesaid incident to both your ice granules delivery/supply company and your insurance company.
